name: Tangerine Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add the chicken breast halves to the skillet along with salt and pepper. Cook until browned on both sides and the chicken is thoroughly cooked through. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
3. Return the skillet to the heat. Add the flour and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly, until the flour is incorporated into the melted butter.
4. Gradually add the orange juice concentrate, water, and cinnamon to the skillet. Stir well and let the mixture simmer over low heat for about 5 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
5. Return the chicken to the skillet and spoon some of the sauce over each piece. Cover the skillet and continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes, or until heated through.
6. Gently stir in the tangerine sections and grated tangerine peel. Mix well and serve immediately.
